It imports `ethers` utilities, defines an ABI with a single `migrate` function, and provides methods to create an interface and connect to a contract.\n   - The ABI specifies a typical token migration function with standard parameters: token address, minimum amounts, recipient address, and deadline.\n   - The code contains no network requests, no environment variable usage, no dynamic code execution, or data leaks.\n   - The source map and comments indicate autogenerated boilerplate code, common in smart contract SDKs.\n\n2. **Assessment of the Reports:**\n   -
